title: Developed an AI backtesting platform where you don't have to know how to code
author: Flat-Dragonfruit8746
selftext:
[AI-Quant Studio](https://reddit.com/link/1l3l1qf/video/pm515imz005f1/player)

I built a tool called [AI-Quant Studio](https://aiquantstudio.com/) to solve a problem I kept running into as a trader — testing strategies shouldn't require coding skills.

With this tool, you can describe your setup in plain English, and it turns that into a backtest automatically. For example, you can type something like:

“Buy when RSI(14) crosses below 30 and price closes above the 10 EMA. Stop loss: 1.5x ATR. Exit: when RSI crosses 70.”

It runs that logic over historical data and shows you stats like win rate, drawdown, and average return — no Pine Script or Python required.

We also integrated web search so it can recognize uncommon indicators and logic if needed. It’s designed to help traders move from ideas to tested strategies much faster.

We’re launching a **free beta** next week, and I’d really appreciate feedback from fellow traders here:

How do you currently backtest or validate strategies?

Would something like this be useful for your workflow?
